# MorForm

> MorForm is a suite of three construction apps for small crews and contractors: field time tracking, FLHA/JHA safety forms, expense tracking, job estimates, dispatch and field reports. Each app is a one-time purchase with no MorForm account and no subscription; MorForm runs no servers of its own. The apps exchange data peer-to-peer as small files — by email, or through a shared folder the user connects in their own Google Drive, Dropbox or OneDrive.

Key facts:
- MorForm (Supervisor) — iOS & Android, $6.99 USD one-time. Field time tracking, expenses with receipt photos, FLHA/JHA, site hazard inspections, emergency response plans, incident reports; emails timesheets, expense reports and safety forms to the right manager.
- MorForm Manager — iOS & Android, $34.99 USD one-time. Field-side project management: builds job specs (job type → subtypes → trades & scope from a saved library), dispatches jobs to supervisors (.morjob), tracks budgets vs actuals, reviews supervisor reports (.morrep), sends job requests to MorForm Office for estimating.
- MorForm Office — Windows 10/11 desktop, $299.99 CAD one-time, with a 15-day free trial. Estimating and back office: estimate pipeline (Draft → Approved → Quoted → Won/Lost) with named templates and custom columns, PDF proposals and quotes, progress draws, QuickBooks export, company dashboard, crew and vendor directories, report review; syncs with Manager mobile (.mordata).
- Privacy model: no MorForm account, no MorForm servers, no tracking, no ads. Data leaves the device only when the user sends it — as an email attachment, or into a shared cloud folder they connect (their own Google Drive, Dropbox or OneDrive, under that provider's terms). MorForm never sees the user's cloud login.
- Works offline; built by a working site supervisor in Edmonton, Alberta, Canada.

## Apps
- [MorForm on the App Store](https://apps.apple.com/ca/app/morform/id6744827471)
- [MorForm on Google Play](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.bryceduhamel.morform)
- [MorForm Manager on the App Store](https://apps.apple.com/ca/app/morform-manager/id6772639424)
- [MorForm Manager on Google Play](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.bryceduhamel.morformgoldversion)
- [MorForm Office on the Microsoft Store](https://apps.microsoft.com/store/detail/morform-office/9MWDMMJRBFZ0)
